title: AgentShare Agent Readiness – Scan and optimize your site for AI bots
abstract: Tired of wondering if your website is readable by AI bots? Worry no more! With AgentShare, a simple scan will optimize your site for AI-friendly reading. Say goodbye to cold data and hello to an AI that truly understands you. Give it a try and see your site transform into an AI-ready marvel!
abstract_zh: 你还在为网站能不能被AI机器人读懂而烦恼吗？别怕，AgentShare来帮忙！轻轻一扫，你的网站就像给AI开了绿灯，优化得明明白白。从此告别冷冰冰的数据，让AI也能感受到你的热情！试试看，让你的网站瞬间升级到AI友好型！
